prompt: Flat lay product photography of an organic plant-based protein bar with chocolate chips, surrounded by scattered raw ingredients — whole almonds, cacao nibs, coconut flakes, pumpkin seeds, and drizzled peanut butter — on a warm cream marble surface. Soft natural window light from the left. The protein bar wrapper is partially peeled back revealing a dense, textured cross-section. Earthy green linen napkin in the corner. Clean, editorial food photography style. Shot on medium format camera, shallow depth of field.

Lifestyle advertisement photo of an athletic woman in her early 30s mid-hike on a sunlit mountain trail, pausing to take a bite of a protein bar. She wears earth-toned athletic wear. Golden hour backlight creates a warm glow. Lush green forest and distant mountain peaks in the background. Natural, candid moment — she looks energized and happy. The scene conveys active wellness and real food fuel. Cinematic color grading with warm tones. Professional outdoor advertising photography.

Minimal modern advertisement design: a single organic chocolate protein bar floating at a slight angle against a solid sage green background, casting a soft shadow beneath it. Around the bar, small icons or illustrated elements of its ingredients drift weightlessly — a cocoa pod, a pumpkin seed, a rice grain, a coconut half — all rendered in a clean line-art style with subtle gold accents. Premium, elevated CPG brand aesthetic. Studio product photography composited with graphic design elements. Ultra clean composition with generous negative space.

Close-up macro food photography of a plant-based protein bar being broken in half by two hands, revealing its rich interior texture — visible chocolate chips, nut pieces, and a dense chewy center. Melted chocolate stretches slightly between the halves. Dramatic studio lighting with a dark moody background. Crumbs and chocolate shards scatter on the dark surface below. The image conveys indulgent taste and premium quality. Shot with a 100mm macro lens, razor sharp focus on the break point, creamy bokeh background.

Bright, airy kitchen counter scene featuring a variety of protein bar flavors fanned out next to a morning smoothie bowl, a yoga mat rolled up in the background, and a potted monstera plant. Warm natural light floods in from a large window. The aesthetic is modern wellness lifestyle — clean white countertops, natural wood cutting board, ceramic mug of coffee. The composition tells a story of a healthy morning routine. Overhead three-quarter angle. Soft pastel color palette with pops of green. Editorial lifestyle photography for a health food brand.
